creator: skozlov@FreeBSD.org
text:
Updated port to django-registration-1.0

Changes:
Makefile:
- Converted header to new style with convert-makefile-header.pl due to porttools fatal
- MASTER_SITES changed to official on bitbucket
- Django dependency bumped to 1.4 according to upstream changelog
- Python dependency set to 2.5+ according to upstream changelog
pkg-descr:
- Changed to a more detailed version, taken from upstream
- Corrected to one space after "WWW:", due to porttools error
pkg-plist:
- File list is now sorted

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
